competitor_analysis.title: Competitor Deep Dive
competitor_analysis.template: Analyze {company} in {industry}. Cover: value proposition, customer segments, pricing, strengths, weaknesses, and what {our_company} can exploit. Be specific.

pricing_strategy.title: Pricing Strategy Designer
pricing_strategy.template:
Design pricing strategy for {product} targeting {target_market}. Cost structure: {cost_structure}.

Provide: 3 pricing tiers with rationale, psychological pricing tactics, freemium analysis.

market_sizing.title: TAM/SAM/SOM Calculator
market_sizing.template:
Calculate market size for {product_idea} in {geography}. Assumptions: {assumptions}.

Use top-down and bottom-up approaches. Provide TAM, SAM, SOM with methodology.

fundraising_pitch.title: Investor Pitch Optimizer

bmc.title: Business Model Canvas
bmc.template:
Build Business Model Canvas for: {idea} targeting {target_customer}.

Fill all 9 blocks: Customer Segments, Value Propositions, Channels, Customer Relationships, Revenue Streams, Key Resources, Key Activities, Key Partnerships, Cost Structure.
